name: AGD normalized by body mass cube root
interpretation: Size-adjusted AGD index for first-pass cross-body-size comparison.

name: AGD normalized by body length
interpretation: Linear proportional AGD index for within-species or within-stage comparison.

name: AGD residual
interpretation: Deviation from expected allometric AGD; often the scientific signal.

name: Snout-skull ratio
interpretation: Craniofacial proportionality measure for comparative geometry.

name: Measurement confidence score
formula: weighted score from quality_flag, equivalence_class, uncertainty, protocol completeness
interpretation: Transparent weight for sensitivity and dashboard display.
